message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "title": "German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2021: Post-Election Cross-Section",
      "description": "National post-election survey of eligible voters in Germany following the 2021 Bundestag election, covering vote choice, turnout, party identification, issue positions, evaluations of government and economic conditions, and political attitudes.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": ["Germany"],
      "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Elections", "Government, political systems and organisations", "Economic systems and development"],
      "temporal_coverage": {"start_year": 2021, "end_year": 2021},
      "dataset_type": "Survey"
    },
    {
      "title": "German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2017: Post-Election Cross-Section",
      "description": "Post-election survey of the German electorate after the 2017 Bundestag election, including vote choice, turnout, political efficacy, party preference, issue positions, government performance, and economic evaluations.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": ["Germany"],
      "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Elections", "Government, political systems and organisations", "Economic systems and development"],
      "temporal_coverage": {"start_year": 2017, "end_year": 2017},
      "dataset_type": "Survey"
    },
    {
      "title": "German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2013: Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Study",
      "description": "Daily interviews during the 2013 Bundestag election campaign capturing time dynamics in vote intentions, party support, issue salience, candidate evaluations, and attitudes toward government and the economy.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": ["Germany"],
      "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Elections", "Government, political systems and organisations", "Economic systems and development"],
      "temporal_coverage": {"start_year": 2013, "end_year": 2013},
      "dataset_type": "Survey"
    },
    {
      "title": "German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2009: Campaign Panel",
      "description": "Multi-wave panel study during the 2009 Bundestag election campaign tracking individual-level changes in vote intention, party identification, issue positions, leader evaluations, and government/economic assessments.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": ["Germany"],
      "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Elections", "Government, political systems and organisations", "Economic systems and development"],
      "temporal_coverage": {"start_year": 2009, "end_year": 2009},
      "dataset_type": "Survey"
    },
    {
      "title": "GLES 2017: Candidate Study",
      "description": "Survey of candidates for the 2017 German federal election (Bundestag), covering political attitudes, policy positions, campaign practices, party ties, views on representation, and evaluations of government and economy.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": ["Germany"],
      "topics": ["Government, political systems and organisations", "Political behaviour and attitudes", "Elections"],
      "temporal_coverage": {"start_year": 2017, "end_year": 2017},
      "dataset_type": "Survey"
    },
    {
      "title": "Politbarometer Trend (Germany)",
      "description": "Long-running series of nationally representative public opinion surveys in Germany covering party preferences, vote intention, leader and government approval, issue salience, and economic perceptions.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": ["Germany"],
      "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Government, political systems and organisations", "Elections", "Economic systems and development"],
      "temporal_coverage": {"start_year": 1977, "end_year": null},
      "dataset_type": "Survey time series"
    },
    {
      "title": "ALLBUS – German General Social Survey: Cumulated 1980–2021",
      "description": "Cumulated dataset of the German General Social Survey (ALLBUS), covering social structure, political orientations, trust, participation, evaluations of institutions, and economic attitudes across multiple waves.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": ["Germany"],
      "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Government, political systems and organisations", "Economic systems and development"],
      "temporal_coverage": {"start_year": 1980, "end_year": 2021},
      "dataset_type": "Survey cumulation"
    },
    {
      "title": "ISSP 2016: Role of Government V – Germany",
      "description": "German module of the International Social Survey Programme on the role of government, including attitudes toward taxation, spending, welfare responsibilities, regulation, and evaluations of government performance.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": ["Germany"],
      "topics": ["Government, political systems and organisations", "Economic systems and development", "Political behaviour and attitudes"],
      "temporal_coverage": {"start_year": 2016, "end_year": 2016},
      "dataset_type": "Survey"
    },
    {
      "title": "ISSP 2019: Social Inequality V – Germany",
      "description": "German module of the ISSP on social inequality, covering perceptions of income inequality, fairness, redistribution, meritocracy, and related political attitudes.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": ["Germany"],
      "topics": ["Economic systems and development", "Political behaviour and attitudes", "Government, political systems and organisations"],
      "temporal_coverage": {"start_year": 2019, "end_year": 2019},
      "dataset_type": "Survey"
    },
    {
      "title": "German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2013: Post-Election Cross-Section",
      "description": "National post-election survey of the German electorate following the 2013 Bundestag election, measuring vote choice, turnout, party identification, issue positions, and evaluations of government and economy.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": ["Germany"],
      "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Elections", "Government, political systems and organisations", "Economic systems and development"],
      "temporal_coverage": {"start_year": 2013, "end_year": 2013},
      "dataset_type": "Survey"
    }
  ]
}
